data.title: Apple announces new MacBook Air and Pro laptops, updated Studio Display Models, and MacBook Neo at B&H.
data.description: In a recent event held in New York on March 4, 2026, Apple revealed a collection of fresh hardware offerings. This includes the introduction of new MacBook Air and Pro laptops, revamped Studio Display Models, and the innovative MacBook Neo. The announcement generated significant buzz in the tech community and among consumers eagerly awaiting the latest updates. The unveiling showcased Apple's commitment to cutting-edge technology and innovation, with the new products set to solidify their position in the market. The event marked a milestone for Apple enthusiasts, with the company delivering a range of innovative devices to meet diverse user needs.

data.title: NRG Energy appoints Caroline Golin as Chief Growth and Policy Officer, bringing 20+ years of experience.
data.description: In Houston, NRG Energy Inc. (NYSE: NRG) revealed the selection of Caroline Golin, Ph.D., as the Chief Growth and Policy Officer. With over 20 years of expertise in energy strategy, market expansion, and product development, Dr. Golin will concentrate on spearheading vital business projects to sustain reliability and affordability amid rising energy needs. One of her key objectives is to enhance data center prospects and residential services within the company.

data.title: Hansa Biopharma's imlifidase BLA decision on December 19, 2026 for kidney transplant patients.
data.description: An application has been submitted for the approval of imlifidase, a potential groundbreaking treatment for highly sensitized patients on the kidney transplant list. The Swedish company, Hansa Biopharma AB, disclosed this news on March 4, 2026. This treatment, if greenlit, would cater to individuals with specific needs in the transplantation process. The company, listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker symbol HNSA, highlighted the importance of this development in addressing a critical medical need.

data.title: CPKC to issue $1.2 billion in debt through subsidiary, Canadian Pacific Railway Company, with $600 million due in 2029 and 2056.
data.description: Canadian Pacific Kansas City Limited (CPKC) recently shared that its subsidiary, Canadian Pacific Railway Company, will be releasing US $600 million of 4.000% Notes expiring in 2029 and US $600 million of 5.500% Notes concluding in 2056. This announcement was made on March 4, 2026, in Calgary, AB. CPKC is listed on TSX under the ticker CP and on NYSE under the ticker CP.

data.title: Hammond Power Solutions to announce Q4 & Year End 2025 results on March 19, conference call on March 20 at 9:00am EST.
data.description: In GUELPH, Ontario, on March 04, 2026, Hammond Power Solutions Inc. (referred to as HPS) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the Fourth Quarter and Year concluding on December 31, 2025, on March 19, 2026, post market closure. Subsequently, a conference call and webcast is set for March 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the outcomes. HPS is listed on TSX as HPS.A.

data.title: Broadcom stock jumps after market rally, indexes below 50-day lines. Earnings beat expectations.
data.description: On Wednesday, the stock market experienced a rally with major indexes showing improvement, although they remain below their respective 50-day moving averages. Late in the day, Broadcom reported earnings that exceeded expectations. Following this news, Dow Jones futures responded positively, with AI chip giant Broadcom surging. This development comes after a recent uptick in the stock market.

data.title: TECNO partners with Arm to enhance on-device generative AI for mobile devices at MWC 2026 in Barcelona.
data.description: In an effort to enhance on-device generative AI rendering for mobile devices and creative tools, a new collaboration has been announced. The partnership aims to optimize performance and efficiency for a wide range of devices. This initiative was unveiled by TECNO, a leading AI-driven technology brand, in Barcelona, Spain on March 4, 2026. The project, called Edge-Side AIGC, focuses on achieving real-time processing capabilities.

data.title: Aptiv announces $1.6B private offering of senior notes by Cyprium Corp. and Cyprium Holdings Lux. S.à r.l., split between 6.125% notes due 2031 and 6.375% notes due 2034.
data.description: In Switzerland, Aptiv PLC, a global industrial technology company traded on NYSE as APTV, disclosed the pricing details of a larger-than-anticipated private offering. They are issuing $800 million in 6.125% senior notes due in 2031 (2031 Notes) and another $800 million in 6.375% senior notes due in 2034 (2034 Notes). This totals $1.6 billion in aggregate principal amount. Aptiv aims to support a more automated, electrified, and digitalized future through this offering by their subsidiary.

data.title: Monport Laser will host a Prime Day event in 2026 to shape the future of laser engraving, meeting demand for precision and efficiency in the industry's expansion.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in New York, there is a noticeable expansion in the laser engraving sector. This growth can be attributed to the increasing interest from various sectors such as small manufacturers, customization businesses, and industrial workshops. These entities are looking for improved precision, wider material adaptability, and enhanced scalability in production. This surge in demand indicates a drive towards higher quality outputs and streamlined operations within the industry.

data.title: Oasis requests Extraordinary General Meeting for Kao Corp to be held within 8 weeks to protect company.
data.description: In Hong Kong, Oasis has officially requested Mr. Yoshihiro Hasebe, President of Kao Corporation, to convene an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders per Article 297, Paragraph 1 of the Companies Act. The meeting is to be held within eight weeks of the request receipt. Oasis has also urged Kao to promptly share written details of planned dates for the public notice of important records.
